transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you volunteering in the campus garden this Saturday?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. I signed up because I enjoy outdoor projects and need community service hours.

choices.text: She enjoys outdoor projects and needs community service hours.
She has to meet her biology professor.
She wants to plant flowers for a class.
She is looking for a part-time job.
